title: SOL 2pk Bamboo Cutting Board for Kitchen 30 x 20cm x 1cm Wooden Chopping Surface for Bread Meat Fruit and Vegetables Durable Serving Tray for Household Meal Preparation Everyday Use
features: Effortless Handling: Despite its strength, bamboo is lightweight, making the wood chopping boards easy to manoeuvre and store. Experience the convenience of a wood board that's easy to lift and carry.
Stylish and Aesthetic Appeal: The natural grain and finish of bamboo provide a sleek and modern look, enhancing the visual appeal of your kitchen with our wooden board.
Versatile Use: Suitable for chopping, slicing, and serving, this chopping block can be used for various kitchen tasks. Make meal prep a breeze with this all-in-one kitchen companion.
Gentle on Knives: The wood cutting board's surface is gentle on knives, preventing them from dulling quickly compared to harder surfaces. Maintain your knives’ sharpness for effortless cutting.

Durable and Long-Lasting: Bamboo is a highly durable material, making the kitchen cutting boards resistant to cracks, warping, and scarring. Enjoy a long-lasting kitchen essential that stands the test of time.

Simply wash the chopping board with soap and water after use. For best results, dry it immediately and store it in a dry place. Can this chopping board be used for both chopping and serving? Yes, this versatile bamboo chopping board is perfect for chopping, slicing, and serving. What makes this bamboo chopping board different from others? This bamboo chopping board features a lightweight design for easy handling and a stylish finish that enhances your kitchen's appearance. Is this chopping board suitable for use with all types of knives? Absolutely. The bamboo surface is gentle on knives, helping to maintain their sharpness. It’s ideal for use with all types of kitchen knives, from chef's knives to paring knives. What are the dimensions and weight of the bamboo chopping board? Each board measures 30201cm and weighs 405g. It comes as a set of 2, with a total unit size of 30202cm and a combined weight of 820g, providing a convenient and practical size for everyday use.
